violations.text: The doors to the outside, located at the entrance and in receiving, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2026
